contentBlocks.original:
नमोऽस्तु रामाय सलक्ष्मणाय
देव्यै च तस्यै जनकात्मजायै ।
नमोऽस्तु रुद्रेन्द्रयमानिलेभ्यो
नमोऽस्तु चन्द्रार्कमरुद्गणेभ्यः ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
namo'stu rāmāya salakṣmaṇāya
devyai ca tasyai janakātmajāyai .
namo'stu rudrendrayamānilebhyo
namo'stu candrārkamarudgaṇebhyaḥ ..
contentBlocks.translation:
Salutations to Rama, along with Lakshmana.
Salutations to Sita, the divine daughter of King Janaka.
Salutations to Rudra (Shiva), Indra, Yama (god of death), and Vayu (wind-god).
Salutations to the Moon, the Sun, and all the Maruts (wind deities).
contentBlocks.meanings: नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; अस्तु (astu) – let there be; रामाय (rāmāya) – to Rama; सलक्ष्मणाय (salakṣmaṇāya) – with Lakshmana (sa:with | lakṣmaṇāya:to Lakshmana); देव्यै (devyai) – to the goddess; च (ca) – and; तस्यै (tasyai) – to that; जनकात्मजायै (janakātmajāyai) – to Janaka's daughter (janaka:Janaka | ātmajāyai:to the daughter); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; अस्तु (astu) – let there be; रुद्र (rudra) – to Rudra; इन्द्र (indra) – to Indra; यम (yama) – to Yama; अनिल (anila) – to Vayu; इभ्यः (ibhyaḥ) – to them; नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; अस्तु (astu) – let there be; चन्द्र (candra) – to the Moon; अर्क (arka) – to the Sun; मरुद्गणेभ्यः (marudgaṇebhyaḥ) – to the Maruts (marut:Maruts | gaṇebhyaḥ:to the groups);
